description_long: This is a modern rocking chair featuring a sturdy wooden frame with a rich, dark brown finish. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a smooth, light beige material that appears to be either leather or high-quality vinyl, providing a comfortable and elegant sitting experience. The chair has angular armrests and a geometric silhouette, with the wooden rockers extending seamlessly from the legs to allow gentle rocking motion. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, offering ample support for the upper body. The overall design is minimalist yet functional, making it suitable for contemporary urban settings such as lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish patios. The visible surfaces are smooth and well-finished, with no visible patterns or embellishments.
description: A modern rocking chair with a dark wooden frame and light beige upholstered seat and backrest, featuring angular armrests and a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, cushioned seat and backrest, framed by angular wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, padded seat and backrest, as well as the continuous wooden rocker base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, dark wooden back panel and the full width of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the chair's profile and the smooth transition of the rocker base.
